raw_consumer_statement:
A credit card was mailed but stolen by a thief who has been apprehended by the XXXX Police Department, XXXX, USA. The police confirmed the suspect had the credit card in person. 

Charges : * XX/XX/2025 : {$320.00} * XX/XX/2025 : {$250.00} I called the credit card company American Express, which will be referred as the " company '', on XX/XX/2025 and confirmed that a case was created. I reached out to them again today on XX/XX/2025 and the company still have not resolved the issue. I have not been refunded the charges nor the additional fees that have incurred. 

The company has not taken any actions in the past two months and have continuously reported that this is " under investigation. '' This is not a fair practice given that the suspect has been apprehended and had the stolen credit card in possession.

The company failed to report and send the acknowledgement letter.
